# Chapter 19: Seeing systems whole  (~120 pp)
- 19.1 Synthesis: what we have learned across the seventeen chapters (12) · 19.2 Systems thinking practices: causal-loop diagrams, stock-and-flow models, archetype recognition (20) · 19.3 The discipline of asking what the system optimises against (15) · 19.4 Boundaries: where to cut, where to include (15) · 19.5 Emergent behaviour (15) · 19.6 The systems engineer as professional role (15) · 19.7 Failure section: when "systems thinking" became a slogan that hid the work (12) · 19.8 Closing: handing the reader to Volume X (16)

**Archetype**: ethics, all. **Project**: take any of the previous 17 chapters' projects and re-analyse it as a coupled system; identify three things missed the first time. **Exercises**: 20.
